context.current_marketing_model: Traditional enterprise marketing: analyst relations, conference sponsorships, and account-based marketing managed in Salesforce
context.target_audience: Chief Compliance Officers and Heads of Regulatory Affairs at tier-1 banks
goals: Evolve from conference-dependent pipeline to always-on agent-discoverable presence
Make compliance capability catalog machine-readable for procurement agents
Maintain enterprise trust while increasing automation
constraints: Heavy regulatory review on all public-facing content
Limited brand awareness outside existing client base
context.additional_context: Competitors are beginning to publish agent-callable API documentation for their compliance modules. NexaCompliance has APIs but no agent-facing discovery layer.
